title: Christmas Holidays
description: Enjoy Christmas in this Christmas modpack, where you can enjoy lots of decorations and a snowy world!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Christmas_Holidays/BH_Christmas_Holidays_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/new-christmas-modpack) version.** ## Christmas is very close, and therefore, we want to celebrate it with a new thematic modpack ideal for these special dates! This new modpack is composed of a lot of Christmas mods, especially for decoration, although there is much more that you will discover as you progress in your game, such as new Christmas enemies, structures, and much more! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Christmas_Holidays/BH_Christmas_Holidays_summary.webp) This is a modpack dedicated to Christmas lovers, among other things, most of the biomes in the game will always be snowy, and snowfalls will be very frequent, so don't forget to bring warm clothes! Also, if you like Christmas decorations, it's your time, there are a lot of mods ideal for decorating your buildings, as well as mods of typical Christmas food, and many more surprises. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Christmas_Holidays/BH_Christmas_Holidays_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Do you want to modify the weather so that it is always snowing? ### It's very easy! The Snowy mod allows it to snow continuously, or on the contrary, not to snow all the time, but all the biomes are snowed. From version 3.5.0, we have disabled the continuous snow, and it will only snow at certain times of the game, so it will not be snowing all the time. Don't worry, you can modify it in the “config” --> “snowy” folder. ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Christmas_Holidays/BH_Christmas_Holidays_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ekak1Su/images/b4eae036e4b73a7046a8ecf60f268017e3dedac4.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ekak1Su/images/16773cb92a258dd50b0effbac5792ce24205d873.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ekak1Su/images/1bdb319541a8a3cfa7fc966d3eb036cf411c03c2.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
